ast.name: description
ast.target: 实现智能环境的最佳实践。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimum length of entity to embed (in characters).
ast.target: 嵌入实体的最小长度（以字符为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turning on will include the folder path in the connections results.
ast.target: 开启后将在连接结果中包含文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adjust the number of connections displayed in the connections view (default 20).
ast.target: 调整连接视图中显示的连接数量（默认 20）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that already link to the current note from the connections results.
ast.target: 从连接结果中排除已链接到当前笔记的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that are already linked from within the current note from appearing in the connections results.
ast.target: 从连接结果中排除当前笔记中已链接的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be included in the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记的文件/文件夹路径必须与此值匹配。匹配的笔记将被包含在连接结果中。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must *not* match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be *excluded* from the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记的文件/文件夹路径必须*不*与此值匹配。匹配的笔记将被从连接结果中*排除*。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show only sources in the connections results (no blocks).
ast.target: 在连接结果中仅显示来源（不显示块）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a model platform to use with Smart Model.
ast.target: 选择要与智能模型配合使用的模型平台。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select an embedding model platform. The default 'transformers' utilizes built-in local models.
ast.target: 选择一个嵌入模型平台。默认的

ast.name: description
ast.target: 本地，8,192 tokens，768 维，中英双语

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "info" level events.
ast.target: 为"info"级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "warning" level events.
ast.target: 为"警告"级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "error" level events.
ast.target: 为"错误"级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "attention" level events.
ast.target: 为"注意"级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "milestone" level events.
ast.target: 为"里程碑"级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A friendly name for this model configuration.
ast.target: 此模型配置的友好名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The model to use from the selected provider.
ast.target: 从所选提供商使用的模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether results should be sources or blocks.
ast.target: 选择结果应为来源还是块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Blocks represent parts/sections of notes. Get more granular results.
ast.target: 块代表笔记的部分/段落。获取更细粒度的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Time in seconds to wait before re-importing a file after modification. Increase if re-importing is interfering with editing experience. Decrease to have changes reflected in the Smart Environment more quickly.
ast.target: 文件修改后重新导入前的等待时间（秒）。如果重新导入干扰了编辑体验，请增加该值；如需更快速地在智能环境中反映更改，请减少该值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage the list of folders excluded from processing.
ast.target: 管理排除在处理的文件夹列表。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 清除源数据并重新导入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Receive a practical onboarding sequence with focused Smart Plugins workflows.
ast.target: 接收一个实用的入门引导序列，其中包含重点突出的智能插件工作流。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wraps each context item with a pre-configured template.
ast.target: 使用预配置的模板包裹每个上下文项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template to wrap before the context item content.
ast.target: 在上下文项内容之前包裹的模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template to wrap after the context item content.
ast.target: 在上下文项内容之后包裹的模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert the item content to a JSON string (forces full content into single line in quotes).
ast.target: 将项内容转换为 JSON 字符串（强制将完整内容压缩为单行并置于引号中）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wraps the full context with a pre-configured template.
ast.target: 使用预配置的模板包裹整个上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template to wrap before the context.
ast.target: 在上下文之前包裹的模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Template to wrap after the context.
ast.target: 在上下文之后包裹的模板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Implements Smart Environment best practices for Obsidian.
ast.target: 实现 Obsidian 的智能环境最佳实践。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which sidebar opens when showing the Connections view.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shows connections for each block within the note. Hover connections icon to see list of connections.
ast.target: 显示笔记中每个块的连接。将鼠标悬停在连接图标上可查看连接列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show connections at the bottom of each note.
ast.target: 在每个笔记底部显示连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated path fragments that must appear in the note path. Matches use case-sensitive substring checks; trim spaces or wrap folder names like `Daily/`. This only affects the results list; Smart Environment still embeds matching notes unless excluded there.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的路径片段，这些片段必须出现在笔记路径中。匹配使用区分大小写的子字符串检查；请去除空格或用反引号包裹文件夹名称，如 `Daily/`。此设置仅影响结果列表；智能环境仍会嵌入匹配的笔记，除非在排除设置中将其排除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated path fragments to omit from results. Exclusions run before includes, so any matching fragment removes the note even if it also appears in `Include filter`. Use Smart Environment include/exclude settings to stop notes from being embedded altogether.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的路径片段，将从结果中排除。排除规则优先于包含规则，因此任何匹配的片段都会移除该笔记，即使它同时出现在`包含过滤器`中。使用智能环境的包含/排除设置可完全阻止笔记被嵌入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers (ex. status or status:open). Case-insensitive key and value matching.
ast.target: 以换行分隔的前置元数据匹配器（例如 status 或 status:open）。键和值匹配均不区分大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers removed from results. Exclude entries take precedence over include entries.
ast.target: 以换行分隔的前置元数据匹配器，将从结果中移除。排除条目优先于包含条目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show only sources in the connections results (no frontmatter blocks).
ast.target: 在连接结果中仅显示来源（不显示前置元数据块）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn off to prevent rendering markdown and display connection results as plain text.
ast.target: 关闭后可阻止 Markdown 渲染，并以纯文本形式显示连接结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a graph visualization of the connections above the list.
ast.target: 在列表上方以图形化方式展示连接关系。

ast.source: Manage all global Smart Environment settings from one tab. These settings apply to all Smart Plugins.
ast.target: 通过一个标签页管理所有全局智能环境设置。这些设置将应用于所有智能插件。

ast.target: 在专属的智能环境设置标签页中管理全局设置。

regex.source: text: "Manage global settings in the dedicated Smart Environment settings tab."
regex.target: text: "Manage global settings in the dedicated Smart Environment settings tab."

regex.source: description: "Choose which sidebar opens when showing the Connections view."
regex.target: description: "Choose which sidebar opens when showing the Connections view."

regex.source: description: "Shows connections for each block within the note. Hover connections icon to see list of connections."
regex.target: description: "Shows connections for each block within the note. Hover connections icon to see list of connections."

regex.source: description: "Show connections at the bottom of each note."
regex.target: description: "Show connections at the bottom of each note."

regex.source: description: "Exclude notes that already link to the current note from the connections results."
regex.target: description: "Exclude notes that already link to the current note from the connections results."

regex.source: description: "Exclude notes that are already linked from within the current note from appearing in the connections results."
regex.target: description: "Exclude notes that are already linked from within the current note from appearing in the connections results."

regex.source: description: "Comma-separated path fragments that must appear in the note path. Matches use case-sensitive substring checks; trim spaces or wrap folder names like `Daily/`. This only affects the results list; Smart Environment still embeds matching notes unless excluded there."
regex.target: description: "Comma-separated path fragments that must appear in the note path. Matches use case-sensitive substring checks; trim spaces or wrap folder names like `Daily/`. This only affects the results list; Smart Environment still embeds matching notes unless excluded there."

regex.source: description: "Comma-separated path fragments to omit from results. Exclusions run before includes, so any matching fragment removes the note even if it also appears in `Include filter`. Use Smart Environment include/exclude settings to stop notes from being embedded altogether."
regex.target: description: "Comma-separated path fragments to omit from results. Exclusions run before includes, so any matching fragment removes the note even if it also appears in `Include filter`. Use Smart Environment include/exclude settings to stop notes from being embedded altogether."

regex.source: description: "Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers (ex. status or status:open). Case-insensitive key and value matching."
regex.target: description: "Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers (ex. status or status:open). Case-insensitive key and value matching."

regex.source: description: "Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers removed from results. Exclude entries take precedence over include entries."
regex.target: description: "Newline-delimited frontmatter matchers removed from results. Exclude entries take precedence over include entries."

regex.source: description: "Show only sources in the connections results (no frontmatter blocks)."
regex.target: description: "Show only sources in the connections results (no frontmatter blocks)."
